excluded_categories.reason: No requirement or business rule mentions user roles, access levels, or permission-based functionality.
No requirement specifies network behavior, connectivity, or offline scenarios.
No requirement mentions language, locale, or regional formatting.
No requirement mentions timezone handling or date/time display.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive test scenarios for successful account creation with valid email and password meeting all rules.
Generate negative test scenarios for each validation rule violation (e.g., duplicate email, password too short, password too long, missing number/special/alpha, email too long).
Generate boundary test scenarios for password length (8 and 12 characters) and email length (255 characters).
Generate business rule test scenarios for email uniqueness and password complexity requirements.
Generate security test scenarios for password storage (e.g., ensure password is not stored in plaintext), email verification bypass attempts, and injection attacks on email/password fields.
Generate UX/UI test scenarios for inline error message display and correctness for each validation failure.
Generate integration test scenarios for email verification dependency (e.g., verification link sent, token expiration, resend verification).
Do not generate scenarios for leading/trailing whitespace handling, email format validation beyond length, password hashing algorithm, or data retention policy as these are open questions.
Do not generate scenarios for permissions, network, localization, or timezone as they are excluded.
